name: Free Online Text to Speech - ATools
description: Convert text to natural speech with multiple voices and speed controls.
seoDescription: Free online text to speech tool supporting multiple languages and voices. Paste text and play it back with adjustable rate, pitch and volume, all processed locally in your browser with zero uploads. Ideal for quick listening, accessibility checks and creating simple voice drafts without installing desktop software.

ui.title: Text to Speech
ui.noVoices: No voices detected. Please use a browser that supports the Web Speech API.
ui.sampleText: This is a sample text for testing the text-to-speech functionality.
ui.note: Note: Long text will be automatically split into segments. Available voices depend on your browser and operating system.
